message:
feat(analytics): enhanced Cost/Models view with dual charts + pricing coverage (2noh9.4.18.8)

Add side-by-side bar charts (tokens left, USD cost right) per model,
pricing coverage bar, unpriced models warning, and daily cost sparkline.
Load model_cost, model_messages, and unpriced_models data from Track B
queries. Selection indicator offset for new 3-row header.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","title":"Task: Analytics TUI plumbing (view router, global filters, command palette entries)","description":"## Goal
Add the foundational ftui wiring so “Analytics” becomes a first-class surface in the cass TUI:
- view routing / navigation stack
- global analytics filters (time range, agent, workspace, source)
- command palette entries and consistent key hints

This task is intentionally *not* about building every chart; it’s about making analytics views composable and easy to add.

## Requirements
1. **View router integration**
   - Add an Analytics view variant to the top-level app model.
   - Support subviews (Dashboard / Explorer / Heatmap / Breakdowns / Tools / Cost / Coverage).
   - Back-stack semantics: `Esc` pops view stack; drilldowns push.

2. **Global analytics filter state**
   - Persist within the analytics surface.
   - Filter ribbon (compact pills) at top of analytics views.
   - Filters must be serializable so we can later persist them in `tui_state.json`.

3. **Command palette integration**
   - Add commands:
     - `Analytics: Dashboard`
     - `Analytics: Explorer`
     - `Analytics: Heatmap`
     - `Analytics: Breakdowns`
     - `Analytics: Tools`
     - `Analytics: Cost`
     - `Analytics: Coverage`
   - Add `Analytics: Set time range...`, `Analytics: Filter agent...`, etc.

4. **Key hints + discoverability**
   - Use the ftui hint registry so each analytics subview can expose its own key hints.
   - Common keys: Tab/Shift+Tab, Enter (drilldown), / (search within view), g (go-to).

5. **Headless discipline**
   - Analytics views must render deterministically in headless mode (TUI_HEADLESS=1), so we can test them with snapshots/PTY.

## Acceptance Criteria
- The TUI can enter and exit Analytics surface reliably.
- Analytics filter ribbon appears and updates state when changed.
- Palette entries navigate to each analytics subview (even if some are placeholders initially).
- No panics on small terminals; show graceful “window too small” message.

## Testing & Logging
- Unit: routing state machine (enter analytics, switch view, back stack).
- Snapshot: base analytics shell renders deterministically (no data).
- Logging: trace view transitions and filter changes behind a debug flag.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:16.904103570Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T02:24:31.566677556Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T02:24:31.566649774Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","architecture","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:16.904103570Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:16.904103570Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:20:03.287585610Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:16.904103570Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:16.904103570Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.3","title":"Task: Analytics dashboard view (KPI tiles + sparklines + top movers)","description":"## Goal
Implement the default Analytics dashboard view: a dense, stylish “KPI wall” that answers the most common questions in <5 seconds.

## Layout (80x24 friendly)
- Header: filter ribbon (time range, agent/workspace/source).
- Body: grid of KPI tiles (2-3 columns depending on width).
- Right/bottom: ‘Top movers’ list (agents/workspaces) with deltas vs prior period.
- Footer: key hints.

## KPIs (v1)
All KPIs should be computed from rollups via `crate::analytics` (z9fse.12):
- Tokens today / last 7d / last 30d:
  - show both `api_tokens_total` and `content_tokens_est_total` where useful
  - show coverage % to explain discrepancies
- Burn rate:
  - tokens/hour over last 2h (and trailing 24h average)
- Tool intensity:
  - tool calls per 1k tokens (and absolute tool calls)
- Planning:
  - plan message count + plan token share
- Cost tiles:
  - if cost is available (z9fse.10), show USD today / 30d; otherwise show “cost not available” with hint.

Each KPI tile should include a mini sparkline for trend over the selected range.

## UX
- `Enter` on a KPI tile jumps to Explorer pre-configured to that metric.
- `Enter` on a top-mover row filters Explorer to that agent/workspace.

## Performance
- Dashboard queries should be O(#buckets) and cached for the current filter set.
- Prefer a single multi-query pass per refresh tick rather than dozens of tiny queries.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Dashboard renders in < 16ms on typical terminals (no jank).
- All KPIs have sensible fallback when a metric is missing.
- Drilldown interactions work and preserve global filters.

## Testing & Logging
- Snapshot tests for 80x24 and 120x40.
- Unit tests for KPI computation glue code (mostly in analytics query layer).
- PTY e2e: open dashboard, select KPI, drilldown, exit.
- Logging: per-view query timing summary (rows scanned, cache hits).","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:46.577428877Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T06:02:04.879489667Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T06:02:04.879466363Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:46.577428877Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:46.577428877Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:46.577428877Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:14:46.577428877Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.4","title":"Task: Analytics explorer view (interactive time-series: metric/group-by/overlays)","description":"## Goal
Build the interactive “Explorer” view: the terminal equivalent of a Grafana panel builder, but tuned for cass analytics.

## Core Features
1. **Metric selector**
   - api_tokens_total, api_input, api_output, cache_read, cache_creation, thinking
   - content_tokens_est_total
   - tool_call_count
   - plan_message_count
   - coverage_pct
   - (optional) usd_est_total when available (z9fse.10)

2. **Group-by selector**
   - hour | day | week | month

3. **Overlay selector**
   - none (single series)
   - by agent
   - by workspace
   - by source
   - by model (requires z9fse.11)

4. **Chart interactions**
   - crosshair cursor + tooltip (bucket label + value + coverage)
   - zoom presets: 24h, 7d, 30d, 90d, all
   - stacked vs overlaid lines when overlay is enabled

## Performance
- All data comes from rollups via `crate::analytics` (z9fse.12).
- Caching:
  - cache by (filters, group-by, metric, overlay)
  - invalidate on filter change and on index refresh

## Drilldown
- `Enter` on a bucket:
  - pushes drilldown into Search view with since/until set to bucket range
- When overlay active:
  - drilldown includes selected series dim (agent/workspace/source/model)

## Acceptance Criteria
- Explorer is usable on 80x24 (controls collapse into a single “controls row”).
- Overlay mode supports at least top-5 series (others grouped as “other”).
- Tooltip values are stable and formatted consistently (k/M suffixes).

## Testing & Logging
- Snapshot: fixed dataset renders the same chart buffers.
- Unit: overlay selection logic (top-N + other) deterministic.
- PTY e2e: open Explorer, toggle group-by, toggle overlay, drilldown.
- Logging: query timing + cache hits in debug logs.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:13.103977990Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T06:03:57.130246717Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:13.103977990Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:13.103977990Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:13.103977990Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:13.103977990Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.5","title":"Task: Analytics calendar heatmap view (daily tokens/cost/coverage with drilldown)","description":"## Goal
Implement a calendar-style heatmap (GitHub contributions style) for analytics.

## Metrics / Modes
- Sessions (from daily_stats) (nice even when token data is sparse)
- API tokens (from usage_daily or token_daily_stats)
- Estimated tokens (content_tokens_est_total)
- Cost (usd_est_total) when available (z9fse.10)
- Coverage % (api_coverage_message_count / message_count)

## UI Details
- A full-year grid when space allows; otherwise show rolling 12-week strip.
- Legend: min/median/max labels + color ramp.
- Tooltip: date + exact value + coverage.

## Drilldown
- `Enter` on a day opens Explorer pinned to that day.
- `Shift+Enter` opens Search view for that exact day.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Readable on 80x24 (fallback to 12-week strip if too small).
- Color scale is perceptually ordered and theme-aware.
- Drilldown works and preserves global filters.

## Testing & Logging
- Snapshot: deterministic heatmap for a known dataset.
- Unit: color bucketing logic (value -> color bin) stable.
- PTY e2e: open heatmap, move cursor, drilldown.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:32.054014393Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T06:33:05.495371357Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:32.054014393Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:32.054014393Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:32.054014393Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:32.054014393Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

- PTY e2e: open heatmap, move cursor, drilldown.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:32.054014393Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T06:50:35.683230180Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T06:50:35.683207318Z","close_reason":"Implemented calendar-style heatmap view with: metric selector (6 modes: API tokens/messages/content tokens/tool calls/cost/coverage), day-of-week labels, month headers, selection highlight with tooltip, responsive layout with sparkline fallback for small terminals, color gradient legend, and 7 new unit tests (normalization, weekday math, value formatting, metric cycling)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:32.054014393Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:32.054014393Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:32.054014393Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:32.054014393Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.6","title":"Task: Analytics breakdowns view (agents/workspaces/sources/models tables + sparklines)","description":"## Goal
Create a high-performance breakdowns view: sortable, virtualized tables with sparklines so you can instantly see who/what is burning tokens.

## Dimensions
- Agents (agent_slug)
- Workspaces (workspace_id -> path)
- Sources (source_id)
- Models (model_name; requires z9fse.11 for best results)

## Metrics (columns)
- total tokens (api and/or content estimate)
- message counts
- coverage %
- tool calls / 1k tokens
- plan token share
- optional: USD (z9fse.10)

## UX
- `/` searches within the table (filter rows).
- Sort by any column.
- Each row includes a compact sparkline showing the trend over the selected range.
- `Enter` drills down to Explorer pre-filtered to that row’s dimension.

## Performance
- Must be virtualized: only render visible rows.
- Query should return top-N rows + a stable “other” aggregate.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Handles 10k workspaces without lag (virtualization + incremental rendering).
- Sorting is stable and deterministic.

## Testing & Logging
- Snapshot: deterministic ordering and sparklines for a known dataset.
- Unit: top-N + other aggregation deterministic.
- PTY e2e: open breakdowns, search, sort, drilldown.","notes":"Implemented tabbed breakdowns view with 4 dimension tabs (Agent/Workspace/Source/Model). Each tab shows side-by-side bar charts for tokens and messages with color-coded labels. Tab/Shift+Tab cycles sub-tabs, Up/Down navigates rows, Enter drills down filtered by dimension. Data loaded from query_breakdown() on all 4 Dim variants. Left for follow-up: sortable column tables, sparklines, in-table search, virtualization for 10k+ rows.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:51.095499488Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T06:43:33.862312262Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T06:43:33.862210011Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:51.095499488Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:51.095499488Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:51.095499488Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:15:51.095499488Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","title":"Task: Analytics tools view (per-tool usage: calls, avg tokens/call, cost/call, trends)","description":"## Goal
Provide a dedicated Tools analytics view that answers:
- which tools are used most
- how tool usage changes over time
- how expensive each tool is (tokens/cost per invocation)

## Data Requirements
- Requires per-tool-name extraction + rollups (z9fse.6).

## UI
- Table of tools (virtualized): tool name, calls, avg tokens/call, p95 tokens/call (optional), trend sparkline.
- Optional mini chart: tool calls over time for selected tool.
- Filter box: type to filter tool list.

## Drilldown
- `Enter` on a tool:
  - opens Search view filtered to sessions that invoked that tool (when traceable)
  - OR opens Explorer overlayed by that tool.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Works on large corpora (1000+ distinct tools) without lag.
- Deterministic ordering and stable rounding.

## Testing & Logging
- Snapshot: deterministic tool table for fixture.
- Integration: fixture with known tool calls verifies counts.
- PTY e2e: open tools view, filter, select tool, drilldown.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:09.010331432Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T06:48:01.220670104Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:09.010331432Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:09.010331432Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:09.010331432Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:09.010331432Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:09.010331432Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","title":"Task: Analytics cost/models view (USD estimates, provider breakdown, model trends)","description":"## Goal
Make cost real and visible: a dedicated view showing token usage AND estimated USD cost by model/provider over time.

## Data Requirements
- z9fse.11: model_name dimension available in analytics query layer.
- z9fse.10: cost estimation implemented + exposed in queries.

## UI
- Left pane: models table (virtualized): model name, tokens, USD, coverage.
- Right pane: time-series for selected model (tokens + USD).
- Provider rollup section: anthropic vs openai vs google.

## UX
- Toggle between:
  - Tokens mode (stacked by input/output/cache/thinking)
  - USD mode (stacked by input/output/cache)
- Coverage diagnostics:
  - highlight models with unknown pricing
  - highlight messages that are estimate-only

## Drilldown
- `Enter` on a model opens Explorer filtered to that model.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Cost numbers match known fixtures exactly.
- Coverage diagnostics prevent “false precision” (never silently show USD if pricing unknown).

## Testing & Logging
- Snapshot: deterministic table sorting + chart output.
- Integration: seeded pricing fixture verifies USD math.
- PTY e2e: open cost view, select model, toggle USD/tokens, drilldown.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.9","title":"Task: Analytics coverage view (API vs estimated; weak connectors/sources spotlight)","description":"## Goal
Make data quality legible: show where token numbers are “real API usage” vs “content-length estimate”.

## UI
- Heatmap-like matrix:
  - rows: agent_slug (and optionally model/provider)
  - columns: time buckets (weeks or months)
  - cell value: coverage %
- Side panel:
  - top worst coverage agents/models
  - deltas vs prior period
  - hints: “Codex coverage improved after token_count wiring (z9fse.5)”

## Semantics
- Coverage % = api_coverage_message_count / message_count
- Clarify what counts as API coverage: `api_data_source == 'api'`.

## UX
- `Enter` on a cell opens Explorer with filters pinned to that agent + time range.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Coverage view makes it impossible to misinterpret “estimate-only” datasets.
- Sorting and aggregation are deterministic.

## Testing & Logging
- Snapshot: deterministic heatmap for fixture.
- Unit: coverage % math and rounding.
- PTY e2e: open coverage view, drilldown.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:39.733955186Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:39.733955186Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:39.733955186Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:39.733955186Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:39.733955186Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:39.733955186Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
+{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","title":"Task: Analytics tools view (per-tool usage: calls, avg tokens/call, cost/call, trends)","description":"## Goal
Provide a dedicated Tools analytics view that answers:
- which tools are used most
- how tool usage changes over time
- how expensive each tool is (tokens/cost per invocation)

## Data Requirements
- Requires per-tool-name extraction + rollups (z9fse.6).

## UI
- Table of tools (virtualized): tool name, calls, avg tokens/call, p95 tokens/call (optional), trend sparkline.
- Optional mini chart: tool calls over time for selected tool.
- Filter box: type to filter tool list.

## Drilldown
- `Enter` on a tool:
  - opens Search view filtered to sessions that invoked that tool (when traceable)
  - OR opens Explorer overlayed by that tool.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Works on large corpora (1000+ distinct tools) without lag.
- Deterministic ordering and stable rounding.

## Testing & Logging
- Snapshot: deterministic tool table for fixture.
- Integration: fixture with known tool calls verifies counts.
- PTY e2e: open tools view, filter, select tool, drilldown.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:09.010331432Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T07:03:00.480355712Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T07:03:00.480321779Z","close_reason":"Enhanced tools view: replaced simple bar chart with rich table layout (Agent/Calls/Messages/API Tokens/Calls-per-1K/Share columns), added daily tool calls sparkline, summary footer, header row. Added tools_row_count() for selection bounds (cap 20), wired tool_rows into AnalyticsChartData. Updated drilldown to use tool_rows. 8 new tests. Clippy/fmt clean.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:09.010331432Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:09.010331432Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:09.010331432Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:09.010331432Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:09.010331432Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
+{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","title":"Task: Analytics cost/models view (USD estimates, provider breakdown, model trends)","description":"## Goal
Make cost real and visible: a dedicated view showing token usage AND estimated USD cost by model/provider over time.

## Data Requirements
- z9fse.11: model_name dimension available in analytics query layer.
- z9fse.10: cost estimation implemented + exposed in queries.

## UI
- Left pane: models table (virtualized): model name, tokens, USD, coverage.
- Right pane: time-series for selected model (tokens + USD).
- Provider rollup section: anthropic vs openai vs google.

## UX
- Toggle between:
  - Tokens mode (stacked by input/output/cache/thinking)
  - USD mode (stacked by input/output/cache)
- Coverage diagnostics:
  - highlight models with unknown pricing
  - highlight messages that are estimate-only

## Drilldown
- `Enter` on a model opens Explorer filtered to that model.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Cost numbers match known fixtures exactly.
- Coverage diagnostics prevent “false precision” (never silently show USD if pricing unknown).

## Testing & Logging
- Snapshot: deterministic table sorting + chart output.
- Integration: seeded pricing fixture verifies USD math.
- PTY e2e: open cost view, select model, toggle USD/tokens, drilldown.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ubuntu","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T06:54:26.577383294Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T06:54:26.577358578Z","close_reason":"Enhanced Cost view with: cost summary header (total USD, per-message, per-1K-tokens rates, coverage %), semantic cost-level coloring (green/yellow/red), model bar chart with dedicated color palette, and daily cost sparkline. All quality gates pass (check, clippy, fmt, tests).","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:24.474582561Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
+{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.9","title":"Task: Analytics coverage view (API vs estimated; weak connectors/sources spotlight)","description":"## Goal
Make data quality legible: show where token numbers are “real API usage” vs “content-length estimate”.

## UI
- Heatmap-like matrix:
  - rows: agent_slug (and optionally model/provider)
  - columns: time buckets (weeks or months)
  - cell value: coverage %
- Side panel:
  - top worst coverage agents/models
  - deltas vs prior period
  - hints: “Codex coverage improved after token_count wiring (z9fse.5)”

## Semantics
- Coverage % = api_coverage_message_count / message_count
- Clarify what counts as API coverage: `api_data_source == 'api'`.

## UX
- `Enter` on a cell opens Explorer with filters pinned to that agent + time range.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Coverage view makes it impossible to misinterpret “estimate-only” datasets.
- Sorting and aggregation are deterministic.

## Testing & Logging
- Snapshot: deterministic heatmap for fixture.
- Unit: coverage % math and rounding.
- PTY e2e: open coverage view, drilldown.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:39.733955186Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T06:54:38.213264479Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["analytics","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:39.733955186Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:39.733955186Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:39.733955186Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.18.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-z9fse.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:16:39.733955186Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.2","title":"Task: Input macro recording + playback (user automation + reproducible bug reports)","description":"## Goal
Leverage `ftui_runtime::input_macro` to let users:
- record a sequence of inputs (keys/mouse) while using the TUI
- save macros to a file under the cass data dir
- replay a macro deterministically

## Use Cases
- Reproduce a UI bug reliably.
- Create personal workflows: apply filters, run searches, export.

## CLI/UX
- Interactive:
  - key to start/stop recording (must be in help/palette)
  - toast showing recording state
- CLI flags:
  - `cass tui --play-macro <path>`
  - `cass tui --record-macro <path>` (non-interactive automation)

## Tests
- Unit tests for macro serialization format.
- Simulation test: record events, replay, assert resulting model state.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Macro playback yields identical final state across runs (deterministic).
- Macro files redact sensitive paths if required (configurable).","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:31:45.293981872Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T04:55:25.248037170Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["automation","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:17.667396004Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:31:45.293981872Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.3","title":"Task: Render trace + time-travel capture (record frames/events; attach to failures; inspector view)","description":"## Goal
Make the TUI *debuggable* and *testable* at kernel level by leveraging ftui's tracing and harness tooling:
- record render traces (diff stats, timings)
- optionally record compressed frame snapshots for time-travel inspection
- optionally record asciicast output for sharing

## CLI/Config
- `cass tui --trace-render <path>`: record render trace
- `cass tui --trace-events <path>`: record event stream
- optional `cass tui --trace-bundle <dir>` to write a bug-report bundle:
  - render trace
  - event macro
  - tui_state.json
  - system capabilities snapshot

## Implementation Notes
- Use `ftui_runtime::render_trace` and/or `ftui_harness::time_travel` data formats.
- Provide a built-in inspector screen that can replay a trace bundle inside cass itself.

## Tests
- In CI, on TUI test failures, automatically write a trace bundle to `test-results/`.
- Unit tests that trace writers are gated behind flags and do not affect normal perf.

## Acceptance Criteria
- A flaky UI bug becomes reproducible from a trace bundle.
- Trace bundle contains enough context to debug without rerunning on the original machine.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:32:03.858616009Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T21:09:07.983788589Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T21:09:07.983763112Z","close_reason":"Implemented render trace + time-travel capture: new src/ui/trace.rs module with TraceWriter (JSONL frame/event recording), FrameRecord/EventRecord types, SystemInfo capture, trace bundle writer/reader. CLI flags: --trace-render PATH, --trace-events PATH, --trace-bundle DIR. Integrated with both ftui interactive and headless entry points. 7 unit tests + 2 integration tests (trace JSONL output, bundle directory creation). All 160+ tests pass, clippy/fmt clean.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["debug","ftui","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:17.962827401Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:18.244527139Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:32:03.858616009Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.4","title":"Task: Built-in UI inspector + debug overlays (layout, hit regions, frame budgets, diff stats)","description":"## Goal
Expose ftui's introspection capabilities directly in cass for both developers and power users.

## Features
- Toggleable inspector overlay showing:
  - widget tree / layout bounds
  - focus state
  - hit-test regions
  - frame timing and diff size
  - degradation state (essential-only vs full)
- Optional VOI/performance overlays if useful.

## Implementation Notes
- Prefer `ftui-widgets::inspector` / `layout_debugger` / debug overlay widgets.
- Must be fully optional and off by default.

## Tests
- Snapshot tests with overlay enabled.
- Unit tests that overlay does not affect core interactions when disabled.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Overlay is the fastest way to debug a weird layout/selection issue.
- Overlay never crashes in narrow terminals (auto-disable or simplify).","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:32:19.527765696Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T23:50:25.132724458Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["debug","ftui","performance","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:18.536040241Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:18.814600147Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:32:19.527765696Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
